I plan on making videos on these groups and their reactions to the meaning crisis within the series. They are not covered by [[Awakening from the Meaning crisis]]

* [[Mormonism]]
* [[Bahai]]
* [[Cao Dai]]
* [[Marxism]]
* [[Evangelicalism]]
This looks less likely with shifts to my [[Immanuelle's Youtube Channel|youtube channel]], including the development of  the [[A Systems-Oriented Theory of Everything|Lifeism Documentary]] and focusing on short form content
[[Category:Immanuelle's Youtube Channel]]
[[Category:John Vervaeke]]
[[Category:Git synced pages]]
[[sn:Planned separate videos on reacting to the meaning crisis]][[Category:Cancelled Videos]]
[[sn:Planned separate videos on reacting to the meaning crisis]]
[[Category:Pages]]
